response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video and identified it as a 3D performance by Hololive VTuber Momosuzu Nene at her 2026 birthday live. 2. Identified the song title 'かくれんぼ' from the top-left on-screen text. 3. Researched 'かくれんぼ 桃鈴ねね' and related queries to find official lyrics, but found no matches, indicating this is an original song debut. 4. Due to the lack of official lyrics online, I have set the lyrics fields to a note indicating this status. 5. Divided the video into three scenes based on music activity.
response.global_summary: A 3D animated performance by Hololive VTuber Momosuzu Nene for her 2026 birthday live, featuring an original song titled 'かくれんぼ' (Kakurenbo).
